title: LEGO Star Wars 75424 SMART Play: AT-ST Attack on Endor - Compatible Interactive Toy Set incl. 2 SMART Tags and Wicket Minifigure - Gift Idea for 8+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play Compatible set features an AT-ST with opening roof and stud shooter, a speeder bike, 2 SMART Tags, a SMART Wicket minifigure, plus AT-ST and Scout Trooper LEGO minifigures

THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to the SMART Tag on the AT-ST or speeder bike, a LEGO SMART Brick (not included) responds to motion and colours with engine noises, AT-ST walking sounds, and laser shooting
LEGO SMART STAR WARS MINIFIGURE – Bring SMART Wicket the Ewok to life with a SMART Brick (not included) for responsive play, triggering reactions to movements and situations he experiences

HOW TO ACTIVATE YOUR SET – A LEGO SMART Brick from an All-in-One set 75421, 75423 or 75427 (sold separately) is required to enable immersive play functions (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate iconic scenes: role-play as Wicket sneakily takes the speeder bike from the Scout Trooper and battles the AT-ST with the driver minifigure inside
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this interactive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 8+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors
DIGITAL INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app guides your child on an intuitive adventure that lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, as well as save and track their progress
description: From the manufacturer Building toy for battle action Awesome Star Wars gift for kids Role-play action-packed Battle of Endor scenes from Star Wars: Return of the Jedi with this LEGO Star Wars SMART Play Compatible Set for kids, featuring an AT-ST walker, speeder bike and 3 LEGO minifigures.
